name: Mrs. Fields $250 Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Baking Powder (Add more for a softer cookie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, sugar, and brown sugar.
2. Add eggs and vanilla extract to the creamed mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, oatmeal (ground in a blender until fine), salt, baking powder (add more for a softer cookie), and baking soda.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients, then add chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar, and chopped nuts.
5. Form golf ball-sized cookie dough drops on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes (or until golden brown). Makes approximately 112 cookies.
